name: Garlic Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb eggplant, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pork with 1 tbsp soy sauce in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Combine eggplant and onion in another bowl.
3. Mix sherry, oyster sauce, remaining soy sauce, sesame oil, and sugar in a small bowl and set aside.
4. Heat wok or electric skillet until hot; pour in peanut oil and add minced garlic, chili paste, and ginger.
5. Cook for a few seconds, stirring constantly.
6. Add pork mixture and stir fry, stirring constantly, until pork loses its pink color.
7. Add eggplant and onion mixture.
8. Stir in sauce, adding more sherry if necessary for the liquid to be about halfway up the mixture in the wok.
9. Cover and cook on high heat for about 7 minutes. If the sauce evaporates before the eggplant is tender, add more sherry as needed.
10. When the eggplant is tender, uncover and cook until most of the remaining sauce has evaporated. Serve immediately.
